title: nftables and rootful

comments.body: What is the exact complaint here - what in particular is being overwritten that you would like to preserve?

> What is the exact complaint here - what in particular is being overwritten that you would like to preserve?

Thanks for the answer. I think this is more a question than a bug. Does not work correctly with CNI in rootfull. When specifying podman not to use module CNI, this is ignored ...
I would like to use podman as a root, but not to add the rules to the firewall, the question is about this.
You can force the use of slirp networking as root with `--net=slirp4netns` (be aware that this does come with some limitations, though).
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I think this is answered, reopen if I am mistaken.
